title: Nack Message
help: Negatively acknowledge an inbound message. FAILED redelivers (up to max-redelivery), REJECTED routes to the Dead Message Queue. Requires the inbound endpoint to be configured with solace.autoAck=false and to declare required settlement outcomes (FAILED, REJECTED) on its consumer flow.

value.name: outcomeType
value.helpTip: FAILED: broker redelivers the message (subject to max-redelivery, then DMQ if configured). REJECTED: broker routes immediately to DMQ, otherwise discards. Inbound endpoint must declare required settlement outcomes for this to work.

value.name: responseVariable
value.helpTip: Property name where the operation result is stored.

value.name: overwriteBody
value.helpTip: Replace the Message Body in Message Context with the response of the operation.
